---
name: Feature request
about: Propose an SDK, demo, docs, or tooling improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem

What user or host need is not covered today?

## Proposed direction

Describe the desired behavior, API, workflow, or demo experience.

## Why this belongs in AsterGraph

Explain why this should live in the SDK, docs, demo, or tooling instead of only in a custom host.

## Constraints

Any compatibility, packaging, UI, or runtime constraints that matter.

## Proof or validation

How should maintainers know the request is complete?
